headline: FIX THE FINDINGS BEFORE THEY FIND YOU
subheading: The ten recurring GMP inspection failures every quality team can predict and prevent.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking a pharmaceutical GMP inspection and quality audit, set against a deep navy background. A floating glass magnifying lens hovers over a stylised grid of translucent document cards and checklist rows, several marked with glowing teal and cyan checkmarks while a few pulse with a subtle fresh-green flagged accent, suggesting findings being identified and corrected. Fine luminous data-trail lines and audit-track threads weave between the cards like a connected quality system, with faint cleanroom geometry and brushed-stainless surfaces dissolving softly in the background. Cool teal and cyan light gradients layer over navy shadows, polished reflective surfaces, shallow depth of field, calm authority and rigorous precision, clinical-luxury aesthetic. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
